name: ReferralProcess
description: Customer is asking about the Virgin Media refer-a-friend scheme — how it works, how to refer someone, how to use a referral code, or general questions about referral eligibility and rewards. This is about the referral process itself, not about claiming or chasing a referral reward that's already owed.

sampleUtterances.utterance: How does the refer a friend scheme work?
I want to {referralRole} to Virgin Media
How do I get a referral code to share?
Can you give me my referral link?
{referralRole} — how do I use their code?
I have a referral code from a friend — where do I enter it?
What do you get for referring someone?
How do I {referralRole} for broadband?
Can I refer a family member?
Is there a limit on how many people I can refer?
I'd like to refer my neighbour — how does it work?
A friend told me to {referralRole} when I sign up
I forgot to add the referral code when I signed up — can I still use it?
Where do I find the refer a friend page?
How do I share my referral link with someone?
Can I refer someone who already has Virgin Media?
My friend wants to join Virgin — how do I {referralRole} ?
{referralRole} by an existing customer
Tell me about the referral programme
refer a friend
